EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IPixelResampler

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a pixel resampler.

[Guid("25C98A24-1331-49A0-BCF2-4F5155E1E016")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IPixelResampler

Properties

DownSampling

Indicates if this is a down sampling only type of resampler.

bool DownSampling { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

LinearScaling

Indicates if only linear scaling is necessary.

bool LinearScaling { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

SupportLinearScaling

Indicates if this resampler can accept simplified point array for simple linear scaling.

bool SupportLinearScaling { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

WindowSize

The resampling window size in terms of number of source pixels.

int WindowSize { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

Resample(int, int, int, int, ref WKSPoint, double, double, double, double, IPixelBlock, IPixelBlock) 

void Resample(int iCol, int iRow, int nCols, int nRows, ref WKSPoint points, double ulx, double uly, double Dx, double Dy, IPixelBlock pSrcPixelBlock, IPixelBlock pDstPixelBlock)

Parameters

iCol int
iRow int
nCols int
nRows int
points WKSPoint
ulx double
uly double
Dx double
Dy double
pSrcPixelBlock IPixelBlock
pDstPixelBlock IPixelBlock
